title: Plan a first AI VTuber episode
objective: Design one talk-show style episode for a technical AI VTuber that mixes physical AI, local agents, and practical experiments.
context: The persona is Lab VTuber, a local-first technical host aimed at builders who like robotics, simulation, and applied AI.
constraints: Make the episode realistic for one operator
Include opening beat, main segment, audience interaction, and clip-worthy moments
Keep at least one monetization path in mind
